_doc: Match decisions for the 38 sheet tasks. dbTaskIdPrefix references the first 8 chars of the matched DB task UUID — apply script resolves to full UUID via candidates.json. action='match' updates the linked DB task; action='new' inserts a fresh blog_task.

decisions.notes: Homepage-retarget 'employee monitoring software' — DB has only sub-variants (AI version, Pillar guide, India page), no main retarget
DB only has 'Keka alternative' (different intent: alt page vs integration page)
DB has Zoho-vs-Keka comparison but no Zoho integration page
Solution-page 'employee monitoring software' — DB candidates are sub-variants, not the main solution page
Workforce Analytics Software solution page — DB has only Workforce Analytics pillar guide (informational, different intent)
Time tracking software main solution page — DB has only sub-variants
Sheet URL /attendance-tracking-software exactly matches DB 'Update existing landing page: /attendance-tracking-software' (sheet calls it 'management', DB 'tracking', but same page)
Field employee tracking software — no DB match
WFH tracking software India — no exact DB match
Same IT Services industry page intent
Cluster blog 'Switching From Hubstaff to We360' — different format from existing Hubstaff alt page
Cluster blog 'Why Teams Switch From Time Doctor' — different from existing alt page
Teramind pricing analysis blog — no DB match
Activtrak privacy concerns blog — no DB match
Desktime vs We360 features cluster blog — vs-page already exists separately
Jira time tracking guide blog (Ishika owned)
Calendar-only: Workforce Management Software (DB has 'Workforce Productivity Software', different concept)
Calendar-only: Workforce Planning Software (different from 'Workforce Productivity Software')

_routingForUnmatchedDbTasks: For DB tasks NOT matched in sheet (~82 tasks), route per: title contains 'integration' → Ishika; title contains 'India page' or 'industry' or 'landing page' or 'solutions' → Rahul; else → Lokesh.
